document: A full-stack Next.js application using the T3 architecture. Needs tRPC for API, TailwindCSS for styling, Prisma for database ORM, and NextAuth for authentication.
A classic MERN stack application. Needs MongoDB with Mongoose, Express.js backend, React frontend with React Router, and Node.js.
A modern web app using the Epic Stack architecture. Needs Remix for the framework, SQLite with Prisma for the database, and Zod for validation.
An AI chatbot application. Needs React for the frontend, Vercel AI SDK for managing AI state, the OpenAI Node.js SDK, and TailwindCSS for styling.

A real-time collaborative document editor similar to Notion. The backend needs a Node.js WebSocket server with Redis for pub/sub. The frontend needs React, a rich text editor framework like TipTap, and Yjs for CRDT-based conflict resolution.
A modern headless e-commerce storefront. Needs Next.js for SSR, Stripe for payment processing, GraphQL for fetching products from a headless CMS, and Framer Motion for complex cart animations.

An internal HR analytics dashboard with strict Role-Based Access Control. Needs an enterprise-grade data grid component, a charting library for analytics, Auth0 for SSO integration, and React Query for data fetching.

A heavy-duty asynchronous worker service for audio transcription. Needs Express for the API, BullMQ for handling background job queues backed by Redis, AWS SDK for S3 file storage, and a reliable multipart form-data parser for handling large file uploads.
A decentralized Web3 application for minting NFTs. Needs React for the frontend, ethers.js for blockchain interaction, Wagmi for wallet connections, and a reliable IPFS client for uploading metadata.
